news.summary: As unmanned aerial systems continue to evolve from recreational tools into potential threats to public safety, critical infrastructure and major public events, the Washington National Guard is positioning itself at the forefront of counter-UAS training and readiness.

news.headline: French diplomat in Mali sentenced to 20 years in prison for 'undermining state security'
news.summary: A court in Mali has sentenced a French intelligence agent with diplomatic status to 20 years in prison for “undermining state security”, judicial sources said Friday, in a ruling that further strains already fraught relations between the West African junta-led state and its former colonial ruler Fra

news.headline: Norway's crown princess on lung transplant waiting list, palace says
news.summary: Mette-Marit's condition, which stiffens the lungs, making it hard to breathe, has deteriorated, the royal household says.

news.headline: Pakistan ‘categorically rejects’ India’s remarks on GB elections as ‘baseless’
news.summary:
<p>ISLAMABAD: Pakistan on Friday “categorically rejected” India’s remarks regarding upcoming elections in Gilgit-Baltistan (GB), calling them “baseless” and part of a “carefully choreographed attempt to conflate fact with fiction”.</p>
